name: Quick Orzo Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the orzo and garlic in butter in a heavy casserole over medium heat, stirring constantly for 2 to 2 1/2 minutes until golden brown.
2. Sprinkle on the onion soup mix and mix in.
3. Add water or stock and stir well.
4. Cover and simmer for 10 minutes.
5. Add sliced mushrooms; do not stir. Cover and simmer for another 10 minutes.
6. Sprinkle parsley over the top and stir to combine.
7. Cover and let stand for 5-10 minutes until all liquid is absorbed into the pasta.
